# James R. McCarthy (Jim McCarthy)

> AI-native operating models produce startup build velocity at incumbent scale. Builder and product roles are converging. A small team with the right stack outruns a large team on legacy process.

James R. McCarthy (Jim McCarthy) is Chief Operating Officer at Vixxo. He owns a $495M P&L within a $600M+ technology-enabled facilities platform and writes about AI-native operating models and what happens when build compresses inside incumbent organizations.

## Canonical identity

- Name: James R. McCarthy
- Goes by: Jim McCarthy
- Role: Chief Operating Officer, Vixxo
- Email: jamesrmccarthy@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jimmccarthy
- Site: https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai/): Thesis, track record, manifesto
- [About](https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai/about/): Career arc and resume (PDF)
- [Writing](https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai/writing/): Operator essays
- [Everyone Builds](https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai/writing/everyone-builds/): Manifesto on AI-native operating models
- [The Loop](https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai/writing/the-loop/): Detect, Triage, Act, Validate, Learn, Repeat
- [Start Now](https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai/writing/start-now/): Start first, start small, start now
- [Resume PDF](https://www.jamesrmccarthy.ai/james-r-mccarthy-resume.pdf)
